testsuite.name: com.tableorder.order.service.OrderServiceTest

testcase.name: 주문 상태 변경 성공 - PENDING → ACCEPTED
주문 상태 변경 실패 - 잘못된 전이

testsuite.system-out: 16:19:51.491 [Test worker] INFO com.tableorder.order.service.OrderService -- Order created: storeId=1, tableId=1, orderNumber=20260430-161951-JNTF, totalAmount=9000 16:19:51.521 [Test worker] INFO com.tableorder.order.service.OrderService -- Order status changed: orderId=100, PENDING -> ACCEPTED 16:19:51.528 [Test worker] INFO com.tableorder.order.service.OrderService -- Order deleted: storeId=1, orderId=100
testsuite.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build what is described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3
